allow: Bash(node -e "var fs=require\(''fs''\);var d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\(''./data/1. 초등 수학 문제 1/NeoStudio_20260319_161412_RING NOTEBOOK_033 Page_strokes_parsed.json'',''utf8''\)\);var s=d[0].strokes;var delays=[];for\(var i=1;i<s.length;i++\){delays.push\(s[i].startTime-s[i-1].endTime\);}delays.sort\(function\(a,b\){return a-b;}\);console.log\(''cnt:''+s.length+'' min:''+delays[0]+'' max:''+delays[delays.length-1]+'' med:''+delays[Math.floor\(delays.length/2\)]\);var b={''u100'':0,''u300'':0,''u500'':0,''u1k'':0,''u2k'':0,''u5k'':0,''o5k'':0};delays.forEach\(function\(d\){if\(d<100\)b.u100++;else if\(d<300\)b.u300++;else if\(d<500\)b.u500++;else if\(d<1000\)b.u1k++;else if\(d<2000\)b.u2k++;else if\(d<5000\)b.u5k++;else b.o5k++;}\);console.log\(JSON.stringify\(b\)\);")
